text: Everything here glows with a quiet anticipation. The neon light reflects off glass and metal with sterile clarity. I feel as though I have entered a speculative laboratory—its purpose both overt and mysterious. My reflection in the glass reminds me that I am both observer and observed, caught up in the constant push and pull of research, idea, and invention. There’s an undercurrent of possibility that makes me feel almost exhilarated, tinged with a sense that I am on the cusp of something transformative.
